news.title: Wall Street Expects a Cautious Fed as T-Bill Purchases Wind Down
news.desc: The Fed ended QT in late 2025 and pivoted to buying ~$40B/month in T-bills to stabilize reserves through April tax season. NY Fed's Roberto Perli signaled the monthly purchase pace will be "significantly reduced" from mid-April onward, as reserve pressures ease.

news.title: Fed Balance Sheet & Net Liquidity — As of April 8, 2026
news.desc: As of April 8, 2026, the Federal Reserve balance sheet stands at $4,407B. The Treasury General Account (TGA) holds $748B, keeping net liquidity in focus as the debt-ceiling resolution and tax season draw down the TGA balance.

news.title: 美联储3月FOMC会议纪要：官员分歧加剧，流动性走向存不确定性
news.desc: 美联储3月FOMC会议纪要显示，多数官员认为中东局势可能损害劳动力市场，或需降息应对；但许多官员同时强调通胀上行风险，不排除加息可能。美联储政策路径的不确定性加大了美元流动性前景的分歧。
